questions.stem: What is the primary purpose of Proton H2's Safety Orientation?

options.text: To introduce employees to their co-workers and site supervisors
To provide employees and contractors with knowledge of basic Health and Safety Regulations, Responsibilities, and Safe Work Practices that apply to all Proton H2 locations
To describe the benefits package available to Proton H2 employees
To outline the performance review process for new workers

questions.rationale: According to blk_01_02, the purpose of the Safety Orientation is to provide employees and contractors with knowledge of basic Health and Safety Regulations, Responsibilities, and Safe Work Practices that apply to all Proton H2 locations.

questions.stem: True or False: As an employee or contractor of Proton H2, defining your roles and responsibilities is one of the stated objectives of this Safety Orientation.

options.text: True
False

questions.rationale: blk_01_04 explicitly lists 'Define your roles and responsibilities' as one of the objectives of the Safety Orientation.

questions.stem: Which of the following is an objective of Proton H2's Safety Orientation related to legislation?

options.text: Memorize all sections of the federal Canada Labour Code
Access provincial OHS legislation
Submit a legislative compliance report to management

questions.rationale: blk_01_04 lists 'Access provincial OHS legislations' as a stated objective of the Safety Orientation.

questions.stem: When must accidents, incidents, and near misses be reported at Proton H2?

options.text: Within 24 hours of the event
At the end of the work shift
Immediately
Only if medical attention is required

questions.rationale: blk_02_04 states that all accidents, incidents, and near misses must be reported immediately and will be investigated.

questions.stem: True or False: Only supervisors and managers are accountable for health and safety performance at Proton H2.

options.text: True
False

questions.rationale: blk_02_03 states that everyone is accountable for their health and safety performance, not only supervisors and managers.

questions.stem: Where can the Proton H2 Health, Safety and Environmental (HSE) Policy be found?

options.text: Posted on the safety bulletin board in the break room
At the beginning of the Health and Safety Program Manual
In the employee onboarding email from HR
Appended at the end of the Health and Safety Program Manual

questions.rationale: blk_02_06 states that the Proton H2 HSE Policy can be found at the beginning of the Health and Safety Program Manual.

questions.stem: A new contractor is unsure where to find the Proton H2 Health and Safety Program Manual. According to Proton H2 guidelines, which of the following is an acceptable place to locate it?

options.text: Request a copy be mailed to their home address
Find it online or as a binder in the office or onsite
Ask a co-worker to summarize the relevant sections verbally

questions.rationale: blk_02_07 states that the Health and Safety Program Manual can be found online or as a binder in the office or onsite.

questions.stem: Which of the following correctly lists the hierarchy of hazard controls from most preferred to least preferred, as described in Proton H2's risk assessment process?

options.text: PPE → Administration → Engineering → Substitution → Elimination
Elimination → Substitution → Engineering → Administration → PPE
Administration → Elimination → PPE → Engineering → Substitution
Engineering → Elimination → Administration → PPE → Substitution

questions.rationale: blk_03_02 lists the hierarchy of controls in order: Elimination, Substitution, Engineering, Administration, and PPE as the last line of defense.

questions.stem: A worker identifies a hazardous chemical used in a process. Management decides to replace it with a less dangerous substance. Which level of the hierarchy of hazard controls does this represent?

options.text: Elimination
Engineering
Substitution
Administration

questions.rationale: blk_03_02 defines substitution as substituting something to lessen or eliminate the identified hazard, which matches replacing the chemical with a less dangerous alternative.

questions.stem: According to Proton H2's hazard control guidelines, which of the following is an example of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)?

options.text: Installing a machine guard around moving parts
Changing a work procedure to reduce exposure to a hazard
Wearing safety glasses, hard hats, and steel-toed boots

questions.rationale: blk_03_02 identifies PPE as protective equipment such as gloves, safety glasses, hard hats, and steel-toed boots that create a barrier between the worker and the hazard.

questions.stem: Under provincial OH&S legislation, what is the employer's primary responsibility regarding workers?

options.text: To provide workers with a detailed job description before beginning work
To do everything practicable to ensure the health, safety, and welfare of all workers and ensure they are aware of their rights and duties
To ensure workers complete a minimum of 40 hours of safety training annually
To assign a dedicated safety officer to each work crew

questions.rationale: blk_04_01 states that provincial legislation requires owners and employers to do everything practicable to ensure the health, safety, and welfare of all workers, and to ensure workers are aware of their rights and duties.

questions.stem: In the event of an emergency at a Proton H2 worksite, which number should you contact?

options.text: (403) 000 0000 — the main head office telephone number
911 — the local emergency services number only
1 (877) 000 0000 — the 24-hour emergency number

questions.rationale: blk_05_02 states that in the event of an emergency, workers should contact the 24-hour emergency number: 1 (877) 000 0000, as also listed in blk_05_01.
